sentence: O ceo non está claro hoxe.
ipa: o ˈθeo ˈnoŋ eˈsta ˈklaɾo ˈoʃe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'ceo' and word-final velar [ŋ] 'non'; the eastern block has no gheada, /ɡ/ staying [ɡ] per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Estes zapatos custan corenta euros.
ipa: ˈestes θaˈpatos ˈkustaŋ koˈɾenta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'zapatos' (distinción); coda [ŋ] 'custan'; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A xuntanza é mañá ás tres.
ipa: a ʃuˈntanθa ˈɛ maˈɲa ˈas ˈtɾes
gloss_en: The gathering is tomorrow at three.
notes: Open-mid [ɛ] 'é'; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'mañá'; conservative ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xuntanza' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Meu irmán vive preto da aldea.
ipa: ˈmew iˈɾmaŋ ˈbibe ˈpɾeto da ˈaldea
gloss_en: My brother lives near the village.
notes: Word-final velar [ŋ] 'irmán'; regional 'aldea'; falling diphthong 'meu' [ew] per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Vai de fronte e torce pola primeira corredoira.
ipa: ˈbaj de ˈfɾonte e ˈtoɾθe ˈpɔla pɾiˈmejɾa koreˈðojɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn down the first path.
notes: No Romance diphthongisation 'fronte'/'torce'; regional 'corredoira' (path); word-initial trill [r] per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: A caldeirada daquel sitio estaba moi boa.
ipa: a kaldeˈjɾaða daˈkel ˈsitjo eˈstaβa ˈmoj ˈboa
gloss_en: The fish stew at that place was very good.
notes: Regional 'caldeirada'; eastern conservatism keeps the ⟨ch⟩ affricate and /ɡ/ [ɡ]; hiatus sandhi per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Onde está a chave do palleiro?
ipa: ˈonde eˈsta a ˈtʃabe do paˈʎejɾo
gloss_en: Where is the hayloft key?
notes: Affricate ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chave' robustly retained in the east (no [ʃ] drift); palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'palleiro' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Cantas persoas veñen cear?
ipa: ˈkantas ˈpeɾsoas ˈbeɲeŋ ˈθeaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Palatal nasal 'veñen' [ɲ] with a velar coda [ŋ]; distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cear' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Se eu puidese, mercaría aquela casa vella.
ipa: se ˈew pwiˈðese meɾkaˈɾia aˈkela ˈkasa ˈbeʎa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that old house.
notes: Regional 'mercar' and 'vella' [ʎ]; the palatal lateral is retained under Asturleonese-contact conservatism per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Onte merquei cinco quilos de castañas na feira.
ipa: ˈonte ˈmeɾkej ˈθinko ˈkilos de kaˈstaɲas na ˈfejɾa
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of chestnuts at the fair.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco'; regional 'castañas' [ɲ]; ⟨s⟩+voiced sandhi 'castañas na' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O ano que vén hei viaxar a Ourense.
ipa: o ˈano ke ˈbɛŋ ˈej bjaˈʃaɾ a oˈwɾense
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Ourense.
notes: Open-mid [ɛ] 'vén' [bɛŋ]; ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'viaxar'; place-name Ourense per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Chámame cando chegues á corte.
ipa: ˈtʃamame ˈkando ˈtʃeɡes ˈa ˈkoɾte
gloss_en: Call me when you get to the cowshed.
notes: Affricate ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chámame'/'chegues'; regional 'corte' (cowshed) per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Boas tardes, como che vai a vida?
ipa: ˈboas ˈtaɾdes ˈkomo tʃe ˈbaj a ˈbiða
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how is life treating you?
notes: Clitic ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'che'; hiatus 'vai a' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Máis vale paxaro na man que cento voando.
ipa: ˈmais ˈbale paˈʃaɾo na ˈmaŋ ke ˈθento ˈboando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro'; distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cento'; word-final velar [ŋ] 'man' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O can corre pola ribeira do río.
ipa: o ˈkaŋ ˈkɔre ˈpɔla riˈβejɾa do ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Word-final velar [ŋ] 'can'; trill [r] 'corre'/'río' vs tap 'ribeira' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: A muller vella colle a agulla amarela.
ipa: a muˈʎeɾ ˈbeʎa ˈkoʎe a aˈɣuʎa amaˈɾela
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'muller'/'vella'/'colle'/'agulla' — robust /ʎ/, no yeísmo per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O café da esquina é moi forte.
ipa: o kaˈfɛ da eˈskina ˈɛ ˈmoj ˈfoɾte
gloss_en: The coffee from the corner is very strong.
notes: Open-mid [ɛ] 'café'/'é'; hiatus 'esquina é' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A viña da montaña dá bo viño.
ipa: a ˈbiɲa da moˈntaɲa ˈda ˈbo ˈbiɲo
gloss_en: The vineyard on the mountain gives good wine.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'viña'/'montaña'/'viño' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Unha das mulleres colleu algunha flor.
ipa: uŋa das muˈʎeɾes ˈkoʎew aˈlɡuŋa ˈfloɾ
gloss_en: One of the women picked some flower.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'mulleres'/'colleu'; velar nasal ⟨nh⟩ [ŋ] 'unha'/'algunha' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A ponte da vila ten doce arcos de pedra.
ipa: a ˈponte da ˈbila ˈteŋ ˈdoθe ˈaɾkos de ˈpedɾa
gloss_en: The town bridge has twelve arches of stone.
notes: Distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'doce'; word-final velar [ŋ] 'ten'; regional 'ponte' per freixeiro_mato1998.
